title: RunEvent
description: A single append-only event in events.jsonl. Unknown event types and unknown extra envelope fields are preserved and ignored for forward compatibility.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. Bumped only on breaking changes.

phase.description: Free-form workflow phase string at emission time.

source.description: Emitter, e.g. controller, extension, claude-agent, codex.

type.description: Event type. Known v1 types are documented in PROTOCOL.md; any other string is accepted and preserved.

payload.description: Event-type-specific payload. May be any JSON value, including null.
